pkgmetadata.longdescription: SomeWM is a Lua-scriptable Wayland compositor and designed as a modern, compatible alternative to AwesomeWM. It is compatible with AwesomeWM's Lua API such that existing configs, widgets and themes carry over. While the 1.4 version give 100% AwesomeWM 4.4 compatibility, later versions will add new features and may break compatibility.
